claim: No Stable, complete Unicode dataset, large-data virtualization, package-parity, or recorded manual Risk Class 3 claim is made by this source contract.

semantics.nativeBasis: Native search/select controls precede a named ARIA grid containing row-owned button gridcells with one roving tab stop.
semantics.naming: Every emoji uses a localized text label plus optional tone label; visible control labels and empty recovery are localizable.
semantics.roleOverride: Grid is used because spatial arrow navigation is implemented; category and skin tone remain native selects.

interaction.keyboard: Arrows move spatially and mirror inline direction in RTL; Home/End move within a row and Ctrl+Home/End move to collection bounds; Enter/Space remain native button activation.
interaction.pointer: Every emoji is an explicit preferred-size button; no hover-only detail is required.
interaction.touch: Grid cells retain preferred targets and the grid scrolls rather than shrinking labels into inaccessible controls.
interaction.speech: Localized emoji, search, category, tone, and clear-filter labels create voice targets.
interaction.switchAccess: One roving grid stop plus native controls limits scan cost while retaining direct selection.

preferences.forcedColors: Canvas, ButtonText, Highlight selected state, and Highlight focus preserve controls and selection.
preferences.reducedMotion: Filtering and selection are immediate with no animated reordering.

responsive.overflowPolicy: Controls stack and the essential grid axis remains natively scrollable.

internationalization.normalization: Search uses NFKC plus locale-aware lowercase without altering item identity.
internationalization.direction: Inline arrow movement mirrors in RTL; emoji glyphs themselves do not mirror.
internationalization.storage: Recent ids are consumer data; Mergora writes no local storage, cookies, or telemetry.

consumerResponsibilities: Supply a licensed, versioned Unicode/CLDR-derived dataset with localized labels, categories, keywords, and supported tone variants.
Persist recent selections only with an explicit privacy and retention policy.
Use a bounded/virtualized dataset adapter before shipping very large collections and re-run the complete grid accessibility matrix.
limitations: The component ships no complete Unicode/CLDR dataset and does not virtualize a large collection in this source checkpoint.
Complete Risk Class 3 manual, packed-consumer, and parity evidence remains unrecorded.
